market.summary: KOSPI dropped 2.73% to 5,763.22 on March 19, ending a three-day rally due to Middle East conflict escalation and hawkish US Fed stance.
key_points: Goldman Sachs maintained a year-end target of 7,000.
Market sentiment impacted by oil price spikes and weakening won against USD (1,501 KRW/USD).
Semiconductor/AI sector remains the primary bullish driver despite macro volatility.

art.summary: Seoul's vibrant art scene continues with major new openings and retrospectives.
key_points: Spectrosynthesis Seoul opened March 20 at Art Sonje Center.
Damien Hirst Retrospective ongoing at MMCA Seoul.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective ongoing at Hoam Museum of Art.
